ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pass_throughs" (
  "pass_through_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass-through behavior */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the pass-through behavior belongs to */,
  "pass_through_status" TEXT /* Status of the pass-through behavior (e.g., Used and Supported, Not Supported) */,
  "pass_through_value" REAL /* Value associated with the pass-through behavior */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pass-through behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_through_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifiers" (
  "modifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modifier configuration */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the modifier configuration belongs to */,
  "modifier_status" TEXT /* Status of the modifier configuration (e.g., Used and Supported, Not Supported) */,
  "modifier_value" REAL /* Value associated with the modifier configuration */,
  "modifier_type" TEXT /* Type of modifier configuration (e.g., gain, offset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifiers_modifier_type FOREIGN KEY ("modifier_type") REFERENCES modifier_types ("modifier_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the change was made to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifier_types" (
  "modifier_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modifier type */,
  "modifier_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the modifier type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modifier type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitor_types" (
  "monitor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitor type */,
  "monitor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monitor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_type_id")
)
